hops.context: For the analysis, we use the Meta-Llama-3-70B-Instruct model.
GSM-Plus is an adversarially modified version of the GSM8K dataset, which consists of human-written grade school math word problems.
GSM-Plus is an adversarially modified version of the GSM8K dataset, which consists of human-written grade school math word problems.

question: What is the primary purpose of using the Meta-Llama-3-70B-Instruct model in the context of the GSM-Plus dataset?

options.A: To generate additional math problems for enriching the GSM8K dataset without adversarial influences.
options.B: To improve the dataset's complexity by adding more math problems beyond what is contained in GSM8K.
options.C: To evaluate the model's ability to handle adversarially modified datasets derived from basic math problem sets.
options.D: To compare the performance of different models on standard datasets without adversarial modifications.

explanation: The correct answer is A because the Meta-Llama-3-70B-Instruct model is used to evaluate its performance specifically on the GSM-Plus dataset, which is an adversarially modified version of the GSM8K dataset. This implies a testing of the model's robustness or ability to handle complex alterations made to a basic dataset of grade school math word problems.
